tasks.label: open: AccountService Transactions page
args: Start-Process powershell -WindowStyle Hidden -ArgumentList '-NoProfile','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-Command','for ($i = 0; $i -lt 120; $i++) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ''http://localhost:5020/swagger/index.html'' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 1 -ErrorAction Stop; if ($r.StatusCode -eq 200) { Start-Process ''http://localhost:5020/swagger/index.html#/Transaction''; break } } catch {} Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 }'; exit 0

tasks.label: clean: AccountService port
args: $ids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5020 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if ($ids) { foreach ($id in $ids) { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; for ($i = 0; $i -lt 20; $i++) { $inUse = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5020 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $inUse) { break }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 250 }; exit 0

tasks.label: clean: CustomerService port
args: $ids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5019 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if ($ids) { foreach ($id in $ids) { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; for ($i = 0; $i -lt 20; $i++) { $inUse = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5019 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $inUse) { break }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 250 }; exit 0
